# TornadoAPI Guard Documentation - LLMs.txt
# For LLM Crawlers and AI Assistants
# Documentation Site: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard

## Overview
TornadoAPI Guard is a comprehensive security middleware for Tornado applications, providing enterprise-grade protection with minimal configuration. This documentation site provides complete technical guides, API references, tutorials, and examples.

## Documentation Structure

### Getting Started
- **Home**: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/
- **Installation**: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/installation/
- **First Steps**: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/first-steps/

### Core Features Documentation

#### IP Management
- **IP Banning**: Automatic and manual IP banning with threshold-based blocking
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/ip-management/banning/
- **Geolocation**: Country-based access control using IP geolocation
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/ip-management/geolocation/
- **Cloud Providers**: Block requests from AWS, GCP, Azure IP ranges
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/ip-management/cloud-providers/
- **Rate Limiting**: Multiple strategies (fixed window, sliding window, token bucket)
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/ip-management/rate-limiter/

#### Security Decorators
- **Overview**: Route-level security with Python decorators
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/overview/
- **Access Control**: IP whitelisting, blacklisting, country restrictions
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/access-control/
- **Authentication**: Bearer, Basic, API Key header validation
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/authentication/
- **Rate Limiting Decorators**: Per-route rate limits
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/rate-limiting/
- **Behavioral Analysis**: Usage monitoring, return value monitoring
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/behavioral/
- **Content Filtering**: Request/response content validation
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/content-filtering/
- **Advanced Decorators**: Combined security features
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/decorators/advanced/

#### Security Features
- **Penetration Detection**: SQL injection, XSS, command injection detection
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/penetration-detection/
- **Detection Engine**: Advanced pattern matching and threat detection
  - Overview: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/detection-engine/overview/
  - Architecture: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/detection-engine/architecture/
  - Components: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/detection-engine/components/
  - Configuration: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/detection-engine/configuration/
  - Performance: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/detection-engine/performance-tuning/
- **Proxy Security**: Trusted proxy handling, X-Forwarded-For validation
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/proxy-security/
- **Custom Patterns**: Define custom attack patterns
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/custom-patterns/
- **Security Monitoring**: Event tracking and analytics
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/security/monitoring/

#### Configuration
- **Security Config**: Complete configuration reference
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/configuration/security-config/
- **CORS**: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing setup
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/configuration/cors/
- **Logging**: Security event logging configuration
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/configuration/logging/

#### Redis Integration
- **Distributed State**: Redis for multi-instance deployments
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/redis-integration/caching/

#### Advanced Topics
- **Advanced Customizations**: Custom request checks, response modifiers
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/advanced-customizations/
- **Example Application**: Complete working example
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/tutorial/examples/example-app/

### API Reference

Complete API documentation for all classes and functions:

- **Overview**: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/api/overview/
- **SecurityMiddleware**: Main middleware class
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/api/security-middleware/
- **Core Architecture**: Internal architecture and design
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/api/core-architecture/
- **SecurityDecorators**: All decorator functions
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/api/decorators/
- **BehaviorManager**: Behavioral analysis manager
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/api/behavior-manager/
- **RedisManager**: Redis state management
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/api/redis-manager/
- **IPBanManager**: IP banning logic
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/api/ipban-manager/
- **IPInfoManager**: IP geolocation
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/api/ipinfo-manager/
- **RateLimitManager**: Rate limiting algorithms
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/api/ratelimit-manager/
- **SusPatternsManager**: Suspicious pattern detection
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/api/sus-patterns/
- **CloudManager**: Cloud provider IP management
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/api/cloud-manager/
- **SecurityHeadersManager**: HTTP security headers
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/api/security-headers/
- **Utilities**: Helper functions and utilities
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/api/utilities/

### Release Notes
- **Changelog**: All version history and updates
  - Docs: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/latest/release-notes/

## Key Features Explained

### Rate Limiting Strategies
1. **Fixed Window**: Simple time-based windows
2. **Sliding Window**: Smooth rate limiting across time
3. **Token Bucket**: Burst handling with gradual refill
4. **Leaky Bucket**: Smooth traffic shaping

### Attack Detection Patterns
- SQL Injection (UNION, SELECT, DROP, etc.)
- Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) via script tags and event handlers
- Command Injection (shell commands, pipe operators)
- Path Traversal (../, directory escaping)
- LDAP Injection
- XML/XXE Injection
- Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
- NoSQL Injection

### Prompt Injection Defense (LLM Security)
- **Basic Level**: Simple pattern detection
- **Standard Level**: Format manipulation detection
- **Strict Level**: Canary token verification
- **Paranoid Level**: Maximum protection with zero-trust approach

### Security Headers Managed
- Content-Security-Policy (CSP)
- Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS)
- X-Frame-Options (Clickjacking protection)
- X-Content-Type-Options (MIME sniffing)
- X-XSS-Protection
- Referrer-Policy
- Permissions-Policy
- Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy (COEP)
- Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy (COOP)
- Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy (CORP)

## Installation

```bash
# Basic installation
pip install tornadoapi-guard
```

## Quick Start Example

```python
import asyncio
import tornado.web
from tornadoapi_guard import (
    SecurityConfig,
    SecurityHandler,
    SecurityMiddleware,
    IPInfoManager,
)

config = SecurityConfig(
    geo_ip_handler=IPInfoManager("your_token_here"),
    enable_redis=False,
    rate_limit=100,
    auto_ban_threshold=5,
)

middleware = SecurityMiddleware(config=config)


class HelloHandler(SecurityHandler):
    async def get(self) -> None:
        self.write({"message": "hello"})


async def main() -> None:
    await middleware.initialize()
    app = tornado.web.Application(
        [(r"/", HelloHandler)],
        security_middleware=middleware,
    )
    app.listen(8000)
    await asyncio.Event().wait()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(main())
```

## Use Cases

### API Protection
- Public REST APIs
- GraphQL endpoints
- Microservices communication
- Webhook receivers

### Web Application Security
- SaaS platforms
- E-commerce sites
- Content management systems
- Admin panels

### LLM Application Security
- Chatbot APIs
- AI-powered services
- Content generation APIs
- Prompt-based applications

### Enterprise Deployments
- Multi-tenant applications
- High-traffic services
- Distributed systems (with Redis)
- Compliance requirements (GDPR, HIPAA)

## Technology Stack

- **Python**: 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, 3.13, 3.14
- **Tornado**: Async web framework
- **Pydantic**: Data validation
- **Redis**: Optional distributed state (redis-py)
- **HTTPx**: Async HTTP client
- **MaxMindDB**: IP geolocation data
- **Pytest**: Testing framework

## Integration Patterns

### Middleware (Global)
Apply security to all routes automatically via middleware.

### Decorators (Route-Level)
Apply security to specific endpoints using Python decorators.

### Hybrid Approach
Combine middleware for baseline security with decorators for enhanced route-specific protection.

## Performance Considerations

### Optimization Techniques
- In-memory caching for IP ranges
- Lazy loading of geolocation databases
- Efficient regex pattern matching
- Redis for distributed deployments
- Configurable detection sensitivity

### Benchmarks
- Middleware overhead: ~1-2ms per request
- Rate limiting: Sub-millisecond with in-memory, ~2-3ms with Redis
- Pattern detection: ~0.5-1ms for basic patterns
- IP geolocation: ~0.1-0.5ms (cached)

## Configuration Best Practices

### Development
- Lenient rate limits for testing
- Whitelist development IPs
- Enable verbose logging
- Disable auto-banning

### Staging
- Production-like security settings
- Monitor false positives
- Test auto-ban thresholds
- Validate geolocation rules

### Production
- Strict rate limits
- Enable auto-banning
- Production logging (errors + security events)
- Redis for distributed state
- Regular security pattern updates

## Version Information

This documentation covers all versions of TornadoAPI Guard. Use the version selector to view docs for specific versions. Latest stable version is always recommended for production use.

Default version: latest (stable)
Provider: Mike (MkDocs versioning)
Versions JSON: https://rennf93.github.io/tornadoapi-guard/versions.json
